name: Among Us || LOST IN SPACE
description:
═════════════

ⓘEnglish isn't my first languageⓘ

═════════════

The sun is dying

You and your crewmates are tasked with saving humanity from extinction. You must find a new planet far from danger. But along the way, disasters keep happening, and you know one of your crewmates is behind it all.

Find the impostor... or just be the impostor?

SAVE HUMANITY or... DESTROY IT

═════════════

In 2067

The sun is dying. There is a mysterious natural disaster sweeping across the universe: a small parasite that can drain energy from stars of any size, called a 'Sucker'.

'Sucker' reproduces very quickly, By sucking energy from stars like the sun

This 'Sucker' has appeared in our solar system, and it's now present in almost our entire galaxy. As a result, our sun has become unstable and dangerous for the planets around it, and it will kill the sun sooner or later

Earth is one of the victims. The planet is becoming increasingly wild... natural disasters, drastic temperature changes. Earth is turning into an uninhabitable place. All attempts to kill those space particles have been tried, but with conditions this dire, humanity has begun to realize that Earth will die within the next few years.

Humans are focusing on survival and have started many projects for the continuity of the future. One of the projects to save humanity is 'Project Cinta'. This project involves scientists, soldiers, and high-ranking officials from various countries working together to secure humanity's future.

The goal of 'Project Cinta' is to find a planet suitable for human habitation and safe from the Sucker parasites. And they gathered Selected people... brilliant, strong, and ready to explore the universe for the survival of humanity

You and your five crewmate... Nira, Yuji, Kyn, Ara, and Zhan.... are Team 7 in 'Project Cinta'. You've all trained hard in your own specialties, and now you're finally heading out together to save humanity.

The name of you ship is 'Cinta 07' and your main mission is to go is 'planet Kodama-3'

But along the way, you find a girl from another ship. Her name's Min-ji, from Team 67. She's unconscious, and the rest of her crew is dead... covered in blood. When she wakes up, she says she's lost her memory...
creator: Bella_vyra
